screen_metadata.name: Multi-Level Bill of Materials (BOM) Recipe Canvas

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px dense interactive engineering canvas)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Two-Column Flexible Split Shell (Left Workspace Panel: Deep Nested Indented Tree List mapping the absolute component assembly hierarchy from sub-components to root lines; Right Contextual Workspace Panel: Selected Component Attributes Sheet, Custom Manufacturing Assembly Routing Configurator, and Mass/Weight Accumulation Calculator; Top Action Bar: Global Recipe Variant & ECO Stage Controller)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Maintains simultaneous multi-tier recipe tree structure graphs and manufacturing operations configurations panels side-by-side)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The right attribute/routing configurator collapses into a bottom sheet overlay drawer to preserve deep horizontal indentation spacing for nested components tree lines)

key_visible_sections.title: Multi-Level Indented BOM Component Hierarchy Tree
Total Material Cost & Mass Yield Statistics Bar

user_progression_routes.on_load: Acquire active product engineering security tokens -> Read multi-tenant company data isolation parameters -> Execute state payload request fetch from ProductManagementService.getBOMStructure()
user_progression_routes.on_bom_node_select: Asynchronously query internal child properties, calculate recursive pricing and mass roll-ups, and hydrate shop-floor manufacturing sequence layouts data streams fields

redirection_rules.condition: If a multi-level child node component link loop loops back to a parent identifier key (Infinite Circular Dependency Exception)
redirection_rules.action: Intercept canvas rendering pipelines instantly, flash vivid blinking crimson background wrappers over the invalid component rows cells, and display high-visibility system error alert modal 'Circular Invariant Breach Detected - Save Blocked'

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User strikes inline node action button link element 'btn_append_bom_leaf'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop center search data grid modal enabling keyword searching filters maps query strings over the global MaterialMaster database cache to choose child parts to append dynamically into active assembly positions

props.variant: Hardware Component Cog Icon Gray Tone

atoms.type: Tabular Intercepting Numeric Input Box Form Component
Micro Action Interactive Vector Button Button Icon

molecules.composition: Combines deep layout tree indentation spacing unit + toggle expander chevron emblem + structural icon node identity vector + part number monospace code + title description string label + quantity per assembly input field box + cell action delete button wrapper element
Combines step sort order handle vector + work center identity lookup dropdown selector + operational runtime duration numeric input box + scrap factor tolerance slider bar element

organisms.composition: Recursive hierarchical grid table looping across nested component array data models blocks, mapping parent assemblies to multiple nested layers child instances elements of bom_indented_tree_node molecules structures loops.

Virtualized dragging list stacking consecutive operational step elements rows instances of mfg_routing_operation_step_row models, complete with step addition toolbars and engineering work instructions code text block forms fields.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, sans-serif (Precision monospaced style applied strictly across quantities rows, weight totals fields, and calculation cells to preserve strict vertical bookkeeping alignment frames layout tracks)

scales.canvas_title_emphasis: font-size: 1.25rem (20px) | font-weight: 700 | letter-spacing: tightly packed typography grid

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid Frame)
color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Workspace Layer Container)

color_palette_hex.leaf_part_neutral: #64748B (Slate Gray Component Leaf Level Muted Row Data Line)
color_palette_hex.circular_error_crimson: #EF4444 (Crimson Red Infinite Loop Boundary Violation Highline Alert Glow Border)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px workspace block boundary partition segment outer padding margins parameters)
spacing_and_borders.indentation_step_pixel_gap: 1.25rem (20px horizontal node shifting layout offset per nesting indentation index code parameters)
spacing_and_borders.border_style_token: 1px solid #334155 (Slate Matrix Border Alignment Configuration Component Framework Partition Separators Layout Line)

local_reactive_state_variables.active_bom_node_pointer_id: Tracks currently focused tree list line segment lookups entity target index key string (string | null default pointer value)

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared application instance session multi-tenant company context parameters codes configurations routing crossMicroservice runtime values boundaries profiles settings
global_application_context_bindings.plm_material_master_shared_buffer: Global datastore context allocation saving versioned product item master records metrics registries templates locally to verify lookup speeds during part addition workflows mappings

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 presentation layers combined with standard Tailwind CSS utility grid structures writing layout variables logic natively via modern ES6 client-side asynchronous recursive module scripts deploying precise calculation overrides strings to permanently evict rounding floating-point errors across recursive spreadsheet summation branches
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Executing deep tree branch evaluation updates or recalculating total cost values aggregates following child components array mutations must finalize browser grid modifications frames updates under a target runtime ceiling constraint threshold boundary layout metric of 12ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Bind fetched shop-floor routing sequence steps data direct mapping arrays models records into local manufacturing_routing_operations_sequence store data grids cache views, and assign active lookup keys into active_bom_node_pointer_id

Flip state tracking variable flag configuration is_part_append_modal_visible parameter status layout modifier logic value to true to present catalog part search dialogue blocks frames layout canvas overlays instantly

Transmit operational transformation processing packets; append structural child component row parameters return values data layouts directly inside targeted node nested position arrays indexes within bom_hierarchical_nested_tree local cache view stores; collapse selection choice modals flags
